allowed_claims: RoboCasa365 supports a strong mechanism claim: shortcut-controlled execution-envelope features recover futures that rank0, action-only, and object-only controls miss.
The project should be described as strong RoboCasa365 evidence with RoboTwin2 and world-model diagnostic evidence still in progress.

benchmarks.evidence: RoboCasa365 regenerated random-position n16 hard-negative table: EEF+gripper distribution-only 63.6/64, object-only 31.0/64, action-only 28.4/64, rank0 0/64, oracle 64/64.

stamp_seal K=5 is clean; stack_blocks_two and open_laptop each have 2 clean cases with rank0 0/2 and oracle 2/2. The latest RoboTwin2 paper-readiness gate still fails: only 2 base-ready tasks in the current multitask run, relation coverage is 0, and no relation-rescue task is proven.
Adapter exists through world_model_diagnostic_to_manifest.py, but public judgment data has not been imported into a manifest yet.

A public HuggingFace 40-sample subset is available, covering Normal, Constraint-sensitive, Counterfactual, and Adversarial prompts. It is not the full 1,207-sample benchmark and does not yet contain our multi-candidate judgment manifest.
Current public evaluator audit found Pick reset API mismatch and 7/10 GT replay under a local reset shim; keep conditional until official clarification.

next_actions: Close the RoboTwin2 paper-readiness gate: at least four base-ready tasks, anti-template successes, matched low-DTW negatives, selector margins, and one relation-rescue task.
Instantiate one public diagnostic layer with multi-candidate judgments, proxy-score failure, and an EFV selector table beating the visual/model-score proxy.
Update the evidence registry only after benchmark-level gates pass from current result files.
prohibited_claims: Do not claim real-robot deployment or sim-to-real validation.
Do not claim a new world model or robot policy; the contribution is candidate future verification.
Do not claim validated performance across multiple mainstream benchmarks until RoboTwin2 and a diagnostic layer pass their gates.
Do not use RoboTwin2 as the second main executable benchmark yet.
Do not claim validation on world-model/trust diagnostics yet.
